# Report large files in a folder function Get-LargeFiles { param( [string]$Path, [int]$MinBytes = 1024 ) <# filter and sort #> Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -File | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt $MinBytes } | Sort-Object Length -Descending } Get-LargeFiles -Path "." -MinBytes 42 | Format-Table Name, Length
